task_description: Add Firebase Storage file upload functionality to the candidate form's document section, replacing URL-only inputs with upload buttons that support images, videos, PDFs up to 500MB with progress bars and previews

verification.summary: npm run build passes cleanly. No test framework in project. All 10 UploadField components correctly integrated (including Engineering section). Review fixes applied: disabled button when userId is falsy, upload cancellation on unmount/re-upload, timestamp in storage path to prevent overwrites.
